problem id: 22b516b3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) OR SHL(1)

examples:
  00001000 -> 01010000
  01010110 -> 10111110
  10011100 -> 11111100
  01101110 -> 11111111
  00111110 -> 11111101
  00011101 -> 11111010
  01001100 -> 11111010
  10101101 -> 01111111
  01100100 -> 11101011

query: 01101111
predicted answer: 11111111
